recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Dil Se..
recommendations.overview: Journalist Amar falls for a mysterious woman on an assignment, but she does not reciprocate his feelings. However, when Amar is about to get married, the woman shows up at his doorstep asking for help.

recommendations.title: Dil To Pagal Hai
recommendations.overview: Rahul, the director of a successful dance troupe, considers Nisha his best friend, though secretly, she is madly in love with him. He then falls for Pooja, who is engaged to Ajay.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: Griffin & Phoenix
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill man falls in love with a woman who has a secret that threatens their time spent together.

recommendations.title: Tramps
recommendations.overview: A young man and woman find love in an unlikely place while carrying out a shady deal.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: My Days of Mercy
recommendations.overview: The daughter of a man on death row falls in love with a woman on the opposing side of her family's political cause.

recommendations.title: The Nine Lives of Christmas
recommendations.overview: With Christmas approaching, a handsome fireman afraid of commitment adopts a stray cat and meets a beautiful veterinary student who challenges his decision to remain a confirmed bachelor.
